PROJECT_DESCRIPTION: OSSA - Open Standard for Scalable AI Agents. A specification standard for AI agents (like OpenAPI for REST APIs). NOT a framework.
KEY_FEATURES:
- OSSA v0.4 specification
- Type-safe TypeScript validation
- 12 platform export adapters
- 8 runtime adapters (Anthropic, OpenAI, Gemini, etc.)
- Agent-to-Agent messaging
- Claude Skills integration
BACKEND_STACK:
- TypeScript 5.9+
- Zod - Schema validation
- AJV - JSON Schema validation
